title: CRM
description: We configure request processing, pipelines, notifications, client databases, chatbots and website workflow integrations.

items.title: Chatbots and autofunnels
items.description: We build chatbots for VK, Telegram and other platforms: scenarios, requests, broadcasts and automated chains.

items.title: Lead pipelines
items.description: Lead processing stages, statuses, responsible managers and request progress control.

items.title: CRM for business
items.description: We select and configure a system for real company processes and work scenarios.

items.title: Form and CRM integration
items.description: We send requests from websites, quizzes, ads and messengers into one system.

items.title: Lead notifications
items.description: We configure notifications to email, Telegram, spreadsheets or CRM.

items.title: Lead automation
items.description: We remove manual data transfer and repeated manager actions.

items.title: Client database
items.description: We structure client data, requests, contacts and interaction history.

items.title: Deal stages and statuses
items.description: We design a clear processing pipeline from first contact to result.

items.title: Lead reports
items.description: We show sources, request volume, statuses, conversions and processing efficiency.

items.title: Spreadsheets and tracking
items.description: We configure working tables, connections, statuses and automatic updates.

items.title: Ads, website and CRM connection
items.description: We combine ad channels, forms, website and CRM into one lead-processing system.
